title: The Passport (Third Amendment) Rules, 1978 (17.10.1978)
text: REGISTERED No. D.(D)-72 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 301] NEW DELHI, TUESDAY, OCTOBER 17, 1978/ASV1NA 25, 1900 Separate paging is given to this Part in order that it may be filed as a separate compilation. 720 GI/78 (953) -- 1 of 2 -- 954 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3d)] MINISTRY OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 17th October, 1978 G.S.R. 499(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 24 of the Passports Ac!, 1967 (15 of 1967), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Passports Rules, 1967, namely :— (1) These rules may be called the Passports (Third Amendment) Rules, 1978. (2) These rules shall come into force on the date of publication in the Official Gazette, (3) Tn Schedule I of the Passports Rule;?, 1967,— (i) against Serial No. fi in column 3, for the existing entry, the following entry shall bo substituted, namely :— "The State of Uttar Pradesh"; (ii) after Serial No. 14 the following shall be inserted, namely :— "15 (a) Passport Officer, Bhopal The State of Passport Office, Bhopal) Madhya Pradesh (b) Public Relations Officer, -do- Bhopal, (Passport Office, Bhopal) (c) Superintendent, Bhopal -do- (Passport Office, Bhopal) [No. VI/401/48/78J A. M. KHALEELI, Jt, Secy. (CPV) PRINTED BY THE MANAGER, GOVT. OF INDIA PRESS, RING ROAD, NEW DBLHI-110064 AND PUBLISHED BV THE CONTROLLER OF PUBLICATIONS, DBLHI-110054, 1 9 7 8 -- 2 of 2 --
